architectureDiagram:
graph TD
    subgraph ClientLayer
        WA[Web Application]
        MA[Mobile Application]
    end
    subgraph APIGatewayLayer
        AG[API Gateway]
        CDN[Content Delivery Network]
    end
    subgraph Microservices
        Auth[Authentication Service]
        Prod[Product Catalog Service]
        Ord[Order Orchestration Service]
        Inv[Inventory Management Service]
        Ana[Analytics Engine]
        Rec[Recommendation Engine]
    end
    subgraph DataLayer
        PG[PostgreSQL Relational DB]
        MG[MongoDB Document Store]
        RD[Redis Distributed Cache]
        ES[Elasticsearch Engine]
    end
    subgraph ExternalServices
        Pay[Payment Gateway API]
        Mail[Email Provider API]
        Ship[Shipping Logistics API]
    end
    WA --> CDN
    MA --> CDN
    WA --> AG
    MA --> AG
    AG --> Auth
    AG --> Prod
    AG --> Ord
    AG --> Inv
    AG --> Ana
    AG --> Rec
    Auth --> PG
    Auth --> RD
    Prod --> PG
    Prod --> ES
    Prod --> RD
    Ord --> PG
    Ord --> RD
    Inv --> PG
    Ana --> MG
    Rec --> MG
    Ord --> Pay
    Ord --> Mail
    Ord --> Ship
componentDiagram:
graph TD
    subgraph AppRoot
        Router[Application Router]
        State[Global State Provider]
        Theme[Theme Provider]
    end
    subgraph LayoutSystem
        MainLayout[Main Layout Wrapper]
        GlassHeader[Glassmorphic Header]
        MegaMenu[Dynamic Mega Menu]
        Footer[Comprehensive Footer]
    end
    subgraph PageComponents
        Home[Landing Page]
        PLP[Product Listing Page]
        PDP[Product Detail Page]
        Checkout[Checkout Wizard]
        Admin[Admin Dashboard]
    end
    subgraph SharedUI
        Hero[Hero Carousel]
        ProdCard[Product Card]
        CartDrawer[Slide-out Cart Drawer]
        Modal[Glass Modal Overlay]
        DataGrid[Analytics Data Grid]
    end
    Router --> State
    State --> Theme
    Theme --> LayoutSystem
    LayoutSystem --> GlassHeader
    LayoutSystem --> MegaMenu
    LayoutSystem --> Footer
    LayoutSystem --> PageComponents
    Home --> Hero
    Home --> ProdCard
    PLP --> ProdCard
    PDP --> Modal
    GlassHeader --> CartDrawer
    Admin --> DataGrid
erDiagram:
erDiagram
    USER ||--o{ ORDER : places
    USER ||--o{ REVIEW : writes
    PRODUCT ||--o{ ORDER_ITEM : contains
    PRODUCT ||--o{ REVIEW : receives
    PRODUCT ||--|| INVENTORY : has
    CATEGORY ||--o{ PRODUCT : categorizes
    ORDER ||--|{ ORDER_ITEM : includes
    USER {
        uuid id PK
        string email
        string passwordHash
        string role
        string firstName
        string lastName
        datetime createdAt
    }
    PRODUCT {
        uuid id PK
        string name
        string slug
        text description
        float basePrice
        uuid categoryId FK
        boolean isActive
    }
    CATEGORY {
        uuid id PK
        string name
        string slug
        uuid parentId FK
    }
    ORDER {
        uuid id PK
        uuid userId FK
        string orderStatus
        float totalAmount
        string paymentIntentId
        datetime createdAt
    }
    ORDER_ITEM {
        uuid id PK
        uuid orderId FK
        uuid productId FK
        int quantity
        float unitPrice
    }
    INVENTORY {
        uuid id PK
        uuid productId FK
        int availableStock
        int reservedStock
        string warehouseLocation
    }
    REVIEW {
        uuid id PK
        uuid productId FK
        uuid userId FK
        int rating
        text comment
        datetime createdAt
    }
sequenceDiagram:
sequenceDiagram
    participant U as User
    participant UI as Frontend App
    participant AG as API Gateway
    participant PS as Product Service
    participant OS as Order Service
    participant PG as Payment Gateway
    U->>UI: Navigates to Homepage
    UI->>AG: GET /api/v1/products/trending
    AG->>PS: Fetch Trending Products
    PS-->>AG: Return Product List JSON
    AG-->>UI: Return Product List JSON
    UI-->>U: Renders Hero & Product Grid
    U->>UI: Clicks 'Add to Cart' on Product
    UI->>UI: Updates Local Cart State (Zustand/Redux)
    U->>UI: Clicks 'Checkout'
    UI->>AG: POST /api/v1/orders/intent
    AG->>OS: Create Pending Order & Payment Intent
    OS->>PG: Request Client Secret
    PG-->>OS: Client Secret Token
    OS-->>AG: Order ID & Client Secret
    AG-->>UI: Order ID & Client Secret
    UI->>PG: Process Payment (Stripe Elements)
    PG-->>UI: Payment Success Confirmation
    UI->>AG: POST /api/v1/orders/confirm
    AG->>OS: Update Order Status to 'PAID'
    OS-->>AG: Confirmation Acknowledged
    AG-->>UI: Success Response
    UI-->>U: Renders Order Success Modal
componentStructure: AppRoot: Initializes React Router, global state management (Zustand/Redux), and styled-components/Tailwind theme providers.
MainLayout: Orchestrates the high-level page structure, wrapping child routes with the GlassHeader, CartDrawer, and Footer.
GlassHeader: A sticky, glassmorphic top navigation bar featuring a dynamic search input, user profile dropdown, and cart trigger.
MegaMenu: A sophisticated, multi-column dropdown navigation component for browsing complex product hierarchies with image highlights.
HeroCarousel: A dynamic, auto-playing banner component utilizing Framer Motion for fluid transitions, showcasing trending products and promotions.
ProductGrid: A responsive CSS grid layout component optimized for lazy-loading and rendering multiple ProductCards efficiently.
ProductCard: A highly reusable component featuring image lazy-loading, hover micro-animations, price formatting, and a quick-add-to-cart button.
CartDrawer: A slide-out side panel providing intuitive cart management (quantity adjustments, item removal) without leaving the current context.
CheckoutWizard: A multi-step, state-driven form component handling shipping details, billing information, and secure payment element integration.
UserDashboard: A tabbed interface component allowing users to view order history, manage account settings, and track active shipments.
AdminAnalyticsWidget: A data visualization component utilizing Recharts/Chart.js to render real-time sales velocity and traffic metrics.
ReviewSection: A composite component for displaying paginated user reviews, aggregate star ratings, and a form for submitting new feedback.
ToastContainer: A global notification system rendering transient success, error, and informational messages with smooth enter/exit animations.
LoadingSpinner: A sleek, branded SVG animation component used as a fallback during asynchronous data fetching and code-splitting.
Footer: A comprehensive bottom section containing SEO links, trust signals, newsletter subscription form, and social media icons.
wireframes:
UX Strategy & Exhaustive Wireframes: 'Modern Obsidian' Theme

1. GLOBAL LAYOUT & NAVIGATION (The GlassHeader)
- Visuals: A sticky header utilizing a deep obsidian background (#0B0C10) with a 70% opacity glassmorphism effect (backdrop-filter: blur(12px)). A subtle 1px bottom border in Neon Cyan (#66FCF1) at 20% opacity separates it from the content.
- Left: The OryMart logo, rendered in a sleek, geometric sans-serif (Outfit), glowing slightly on hover.
- Center: A wide, pill-shaped search bar. Background is #1F2833 (Dark Slate), text is #C5C6C7 (Light Gray). On focus, the border transitions smoothly to Electric Purple (#9D4EDD).
- Right: Iconography for User Profile, Wishlist, and Cart. The Cart icon features a dynamic notification badge (Neon Cyan background, deep obsidian text) that pulses when an item is added.

2. LANDING PAGE (The Immersive Homepage)
- Hero Section: A massive, edge-to-edge carousel. The background features high-resolution, dark-themed product photography. Typography is bold and stark white. A primary Call-to-Action (CTA) button sits at the bottom left: 'Explore Collection'. The button is a solid Neon Cyan with dark text, featuring a magnetic hover effect and a soft cyan drop shadow.
- Trending Grid: Below the hero, a section titled 'Trending Now' in Outfit font. The grid displays 4 columns on desktop, 2 on tablet. 
- Product Cards: Each card has a dark slate background (#1F2833) with a border radius of 16px. Images are masked with a subtle zoom effect on hover. Below the image: Product Title (Inter, 16px, White), Price (Inter, 14px, Neon Cyan). A hidden 'Quick Add' button slides up from the bottom of the card image on hover.
- Trust Signals: A horizontal band across the page featuring logos of partner brands and security badges, rendered in monochrome gray that illuminates on hover.

3. PRODUCT DETAIL PAGE (PDP)
- Layout: Split screen on desktop. Left side is a sticky image gallery with a main display and vertical thumbnails. Right side is the scrollable product information.
- Visuals: The background remains Deep Obsidian. The product title is massive (Outfit, 48px). Price is highlighted in Electric Purple.
- Interactions: Selecting a variant (size/color) uses pill-shaped radio buttons that fill with Neon Cyan when active. The 'Add to Cart' button is full-width, featuring a micro-animation where a shopping bag icon slides in from the left upon click, followed by a success toast notification.
- Accordions: Product details, shipping info, and materials are housed in sleek accordion menus with smooth height transitions.

4. CART DRAWER & CHECKOUT WIZARD
- Cart Drawer: Slides in from the right edge. Background is #1F2833. Items are listed with thumbnail, title, and a sleek quantity stepper. A fixed bottom area shows the subtotal and a 'Proceed to Checkout' button.
- Checkout Wizard: A dedicated, distraction-free page. A progress bar at the top indicates steps (Shipping -> Billing -> Payment). Input fields use floating labels. The active field glows with a Neon Cyan border. The payment section integrates Stripe Elements seamlessly into the dark theme.

5. ADMIN DATA DASHBOARD
- Layout: Sidebar navigation on the left, main content area on the right.
- Visuals: The dashboard utilizes a slightly lighter dark shade (#121418) to differentiate from the storefront. 
- Widgets: Top row features KPI cards (Total Revenue, Active Users, Conversion Rate) with sparkline charts. Below, a large area chart shows sales over time, utilizing a gradient fill from Electric Purple to transparent. Data grids for recent orders feature sticky headers and alternating row colors for readability.

6. FOOTER
- Visuals: A massive, multi-column footer. Background is pure black (#000000). 
- Content: Columns for 'Shop', 'About Us', 'Customer Care', and 'Legal'. A prominent newsletter signup box asks for email, with a sleek arrow submit button. Social icons are minimalist SVG outlines that fill with brand colors on hover.
apiEndpoints: GET /api/v1/products - Retrieves a paginated list of products. Query parameters: ?page=1&limit=20&category=electronics&sort=price_desc. Response: { data: Product[], meta: { total, page, totalPages } }
GET /api/v1/products/:slug - Retrieves detailed information for a single product, including variants, high-res image URLs, and real-time inventory status. Response: { data: ProductDetail }
POST /api/v1/auth/register - Registers a new user. Payload: { email, password, firstName, lastName }. Response: { token: string, user: UserProfile }
POST /api/v1/auth/login - Authenticates a user and returns a JWT. Payload: { email, password }. Response: { token: string, user: UserProfile }
GET /api/v1/cart - Retrieves the current user's active cart session. Response: { data: Cart }
POST /api/v1/cart/items - Adds an item to the cart. Payload: { productId, quantity, variantId }. Response: { data: Cart }
POST /api/v1/orders/intent - Initializes the checkout process and creates a payment intent. Payload: { cartId, shippingAddress }. Response: { orderId: string, clientSecret: string, amount: number }
POST /api/v1/orders/confirm - Webhook/Callback endpoint to confirm order creation post-payment. Payload: { paymentIntentId, status }. Response: { success: boolean, orderStatus: string }
GET /api/v1/users/me/orders - Retrieves the authenticated user's order history. Response: { data: OrderSummary[] }

GET /api/v1/admin/analytics/sales - Admin only. Retrieves aggregated sales data for dashboard visualization. Query parameters: ?startDate=YYYY-MM-DD&endDate=YYYY-MM-DD&interval=day. Response: { data: TimeSeriesData[] }
designSystem:
Design System: 'Modern Obsidian'

1. CORE PHILOSOPHY
Modern Obsidian is an elite, state-of-the-art design language built for premium digital retail. It relies on deep, immersive dark backgrounds contrasted with vibrant, high-energy neon accents. The UI feels frictionless, utilizing glassmorphism to create depth and hierarchy without clutter.

2. COLOR PALETTE
- Background Primary (Deep Obsidian): #0B0C10 - Used for the main application background.
- Background Secondary (Dark Slate): #1F2833 - Used for cards, modals, and elevated surfaces.
- Surface Highlight: #2C353F - Used for hover states on secondary backgrounds.
- Accent Primary (Neon Cyan): #66FCF1 - Used for primary buttons, active states, and critical highlights. Represents energy and action.
- Accent Secondary (Electric Purple): #9D4EDD - Used for secondary actions, focus rings, and data visualization gradients. Represents sophistication.
- Text Primary: #FFFFFF - Pure white for headings and primary body text.
- Text Secondary: #C5C6C7 - Light gray for secondary text, placeholders, and metadata.
- Error/Destructive: #FF4C4C - Vibrant red for errors and destructive actions.
- Success: #00E676 - Bright green for success states and confirmations.

3. TYPOGRAPHY
- Headings (Display & Titles): 'Outfit', sans-serif. Weights: 500 (Medium), 700 (Bold). Used for its geometric, modern, and slightly futuristic feel.
- Body & UI Elements: 'Inter', sans-serif. Weights: 400 (Regular), 500 (Medium). Chosen for maximum legibility at small sizes and dense data displays.
- Scale: Base size 16px. H1: 48px, H2: 36px, H3: 24px, Body: 16px, Small: 14px, Micro: 12px.

4. SPACING & GRID
- 8-point grid system (8, 16, 24, 32, 48, 64, 96, 128).
- Container max-width: 1440px for ultra-wide displays, scaling fluidly down to mobile.
- Gutters: 24px on desktop, 16px on mobile.

5. SHADOWS & DEPTH (ELEVATION)
- Level 1 (Cards): 0 4px 6px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3)
- Level 2 (Dropdowns/Drawers): 0 10px 20px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5)
- Level 3 (Modals): 0 20px 40px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.7)
- Glow Effect (Primary Buttons): 0 0 15px rgba(102, 252, 241, 0.4)

6. GLASSMORPHISM SPECS
- Background: rgba(31, 40, 51, 0.65)
- Backdrop Filter: blur(16px) saturate(180%)
- Border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08)

7. ANIMATION & TRANSITIONS
- Micro-interactions: 150ms ease-in-out (button hovers, color changes).
- Layout shifts: 300ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1) (drawer slides, modal opens).
- Page transitions: Fade through black, 400ms.
